title: ctenitis iriomotensis
intro: Ctenitis iriomotensis, also known as Iriomote ctenitis, is a species of fern native to the island of Iriomote in Japan. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. Ctenitis iriomotensis is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses, and it is also used in traditional Japanese medicine as a treatment for various ailments.
